title: CIP-30-DeepLink vendor attestation manifest
description: Authoritative runtime source of a wallet's CIP-30-DeepLink protocol commitments. Served by every conforming wallet at https://<wallet-domain>/.well-known/cip30dl-attestation.json with Content-Type application/json and Cache-Control: max-age=86400.

wallet_id.description: Lowercase ASCII id matching wallet-registry.json when the wallet is registry-listed.

protocol_versions.description: List of CIP-30-DeepLink protocol versions the wallet implements. v=1 retains optional AASA + custom-scheme fallback; v=2 mandates AASA and retires the custom-scheme fallback.

methods.description: Methods the wallet honours. connect, signTx, signData, getUsedAddresses, getRewardAddresses, getNetworkId are REQUIRED in v=1.

https_prefix.description: Authoritative HTTPS prefix the wallet claims via AASA / assetlinks.json.

supports_governance.description: Whether the wallet honours the reserved signGovernance method profile (CIP-95 surface).

supports_submit.description: Whether the wallet honours the optional submitTx method.

max_payload_bytes.description: Maximum request-URL size in bytes the wallet will accept. MUST be >= 12288 per the v1 URI-length budget.
